metadata.description: A marketplace for Weijan's Claude plugins

plugins.name: greeting-plugin
plugins.description: A plugin that adds /greeting command to send a greeting message to the user

plugins.name: 5g-note-generator
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive 5G/O-RAN technical learning notes in Traditional Chinese. Covers O-RAN architecture, xApp development, RIC platform, 5G Core, smart factory, AI/ML, MEC, and network slicing.
